query: i just finished implementing the multi-camera playback feature, added a new file called multi-player.html in web-console/static/. works great, tested with 2 streams. should i document this somewhere?
we just completed P1! all the deliverables are done - multi-stream playback, webrtc working, recording to disk. need to update the project status docs to reflect this milestone
hey so i noticed the backend-api/CLAUDE.md still mentions pip but we switched to uv like 2 weeks ago. the pyproject.toml is correct but the docs are stale. can you fix this?
i'm adding a new ADR (ADR-0005) about timestamp correction at source. it affects edge-agent, media-gateway, and web-console components. need to make sure all the docs are consistent
the root CLAUDE.md is getting really long, like 280 lines now. it has a ton of implementation details that probably belong in subdirectory docs. what should we do about this?
just created a new component directory called edge-agent/ with C++20 code. it's got its own build system (cmake), different tech stack from the python backend. should there be a CLAUDE.md in there?
i see web-console/CLAUDE.md says 'P1 in progress' but we actually finished P1 last week. also it doesn't mention the multi-player.html page we added. looks outdated
need to document this new constraint: WebRTC requires H.264 Constrained Baseline profile, no B-frames allowed. this is critical for edge-agent encoding. where should this go?
we're transitioning from Phase 1 to Phase 2 now. P1 delivered multi-stream playback, P2 will focus on device management and heartbeat. need to update all the phase-related docs
i added a new operations guide docs/40-operations/ntp-server-setup.md about deploying NTP servers. should the root CLAUDE.md reference this? it's pretty important for time sync
can you help me write a python function to calculate fibonacci numbers recursively? i need it for a coding interview tomorrow
